Publications
Publication Summary
Over 200 peer-reviewed publications in top-tier international journals.
• Over 120 SCI/SCIE/SSCI-indexed journal articles indexed in major databases.
• Publications in high-impact journals including Fake Journal A and Fake Journal B.
• More than 30 conference papers presented at international venues.
Research contributions in:
 – Fake Research Area One and Spatial Intelligence
 – Fake Research Area Two and Machine Learning Applications
Books and Book Chapters
Fake Author, A. (2020). Fake Book Title About GIS Modeling and Spatial Analysis Methods. Fake University Press, Seoul, Korea.
Fake Author, A., & Co-Author, B. (2018). Fake Book Title on Urban Computing and Geospatial Systems. Another Fake Publisher, Germany.
Journal Papers
Fake Author, A., & Co-Author, B. (2023). Fake journal article about spatial analysis and machine learning integration. Fake Journal of GIS, 15(4), 100-200. https://doi.org/10.1234/fakejnl.2023.001
Fake Author, A., Third Author, C., & Fourth Author, D. (2022). Another fake article on augmented reality and geospatial data fusion for urban analysis. International Journal of Fake Studies, 10(2), 50-99.
Conference Papers
Fake Author, A., & Co-Author, B. (2023). Fake conference paper about ontology-based GIS modeling and decision support systems. In Proceedings of Fake International Conference on GIS (pp. 50-55). Fake City: IEEE.
Fake Author, A., Third Author, C., & Others, E. (2022). Another fake conference paper on extended reality and geographic information systems for smart cities. In Proceedings of CONF 2022 (pp. 1-8).
